mapper.sql: id, mail_transport_protocol, mail_smtp_host, mail_smtp_port, mail_smtp_auth, mail_debug, username, `password`, mail_from, mail_to, mail_cc, mail_bcc, send_report, create_date
mapper.insert: insert into email_config (id, mail_transport_protocol, mail_smtp_host, mail_smtp_port, mail_smtp_auth, mail_debug, username, `password`, mail_from, mail_to, mail_cc, mail_bcc, send_report, create_date) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{mailTransportProtocol,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mailSmtpHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mailSmtpPort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mailSmtpAuth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mailDebug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mailFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mailTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mailCc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mailBcc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendReport,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into email_config
id,
mail_transport_protocol,
mail_smtp_host,
mail_smtp_port,
mail_smtp_auth,
mail_debug,
username,
`password`,
mail_from,
mail_to,
mail_cc,
mail_bcc,
create_date,

mapper.update:
update email_config
mail_transport_protocol = #{mailTransportProtocol,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail_smtp_host = #{mailSmtpHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail_smtp_port = #{mailSmtpPort,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail_smtp_auth = #{mailSmtpAuth,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail_debug = #{mailDebug,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail_from = #{mailFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail_to = #{mailTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail_cc = #{mailCc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail_bcc = #{mailBcc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_date = #{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update email_config set mail_transport_protocol = #{mailTransportProtocol,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_smtp_host = #{mailSmtpHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_smtp_port = #{mailSmtpPort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_smtp_auth = #{mailSmtpAuth,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_debug = #{mailDebug,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_from = #{mailFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_to = #{mailTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_cc = #{mailCc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_bcc = #{mailBcc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_date = #{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
